title: Bali Has TOO MANY Nomads
description: Bali is full of digital nomads, coworking cafés, and sunsets that make you forget about deadlines. Easy to see why people come and never leave.
coverAlt: Golden sunset over the ocean on a Bali beach with waves washing onto the shore

images.alt: Golden sunset over the ocean on a Bali beach, sun reflecting off wet sand and gentle waves
images.caption: Sunset on the beach — the kind of evening that makes you want to stay forever.
